mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO api_endpoint (
id,
create_time, update_time,
api_name, api_url, request_method, api_tag, description,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES (
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{apiName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{apiUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{apiTag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )

INSERT INTO api_endpoint (
id,
create_time, update_time,
api_name, api_url, request_method, api_tag, description,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES
(
#{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{item.apiName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.apiUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.requestMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.apiTag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE api_endpoint
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
api_name = #{apiName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
api_url = #{apiUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_method = #{requestMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
api_tag = #{apiTag, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE api_endpoint
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
api_name = #{apiName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
api_url = #{apiUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_method = #{requestMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
api_tag = #{apiTag, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND version = #{version, jdbcType=INTEGER}

UPDATE api_endpoint
delete_flag = 1, version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)
mapper.select:
SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
api_name, api_url, request_method, api_tag, description,
delete_flag,
version FROM api_endpoint WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)

SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
api_name, api_url, request_method, api_tag, description,
delete_flag,
version FROM api_endpoint

SELECT t.api_id, t.api_name, t.api_url, t.request_method, t.api_tag, t.status FROM ( SELECT ae.id AS api_id, ae.api_name, ae.api_url, ae.request_method, ae.api_tag, rcur.status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ae.id ORDER BY CASE rcur.status WHEN 'ACTIVATED' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) AS rn FROM user_role_relation urr JOIN role_control_unit_relation rcur ON urr.`role_id` = rcur.`role_id` AND rcur.`delete_flag` = 0 JOIN control_unit_resource_relation curr ON rcur.`control_unit_id` = curr.`control_unit_id` AND curr.`delete_flag` = 0 AND curr.`resource_type` = 'API_ENDPOINT' JOIN resource_api_endpoint rae ON curr.resource_id = rae.api_endpoint_id AND rae.delete_flag = 0 AND rae.`application_id` = #{applicationId} JOIN api_endpoint ae ON rae.api_endpoint_id = ae.id AND ae.delete_flag = 0 WHERE urr.`delete_flag` = 0 AND urr.`user_id` = #{userId} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1

SELECT DISTINCT ae.id AS api_id, ae.api_name, ae.api_url, ae.request_method, ae.api_tag, 'ACTIVATED' AS status FROM control_unit cu JOIN control_unit_resource_relation curr ON cu.`id` = curr.`control_unit_id` AND curr.`delete_flag` = 0 AND curr.`resource_type` = 'API_ENDPOINT' JOIN resource_api_endpoint rae ON curr.resource_id = rae.api_endpoint_id AND rae.delete_flag = 0 JOIN api_endpoint ae ON rae.api_endpoint_id = ae.id AND ae.delete_flag = 0 WHERE cu.delete_flag = 0 AND cu.`landing` = 1 AND cu.`control_unit_scope` = 'PERPETUAL' AND cu.`status` = 'PUBLISHED' AND cu.`application_id` = #{applicationId}
